Betharios, better known as Betharios of Braavos, is the wife of Symond Frey. She comes from Braavos.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Dance with Dragons
  • 2 Family
  • 3 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Dance with Dragons[ ]

Betharios travels with her husband, Symond Frey, and other Freys aboard Lionstar to White Harbor. Lord Wyman Manderly reveals to Ser Davos Seaworth that one of her handmaids slept with Wyman's fool in order to gather information for Symond.[2]
